root_cause: Download button used direct href to API URL without Bearer token — browser new tab navigation does not carry in-memory JWT
fix: Added downloadAttachment() helper in api.ts using fetch+token to get blob, create object URL, and trigger download via temporary <a> element. Replaced href with onClick in ContractDetailPage.tsx.
backend_auth_logic: No changes needed — admin can download any attachment, user can download own contract's attachments, unauthenticated returns 401
version_bumped: 0.0.1 → 0.0.2 across all references (config, main, vite, login, package.json, tests, smoke)
commits: 2196b9a test: add attachment download auth tests for 0.0.2
54dd76f feat: add downloadAttachment helper with token-bearing fetch
dd5cb5b fix: replace direct href download with token-bearing onClick
notes: Attachment download 401 bug fixed. The downloadAttachment() pattern is reusable for any future authenticated file downloads.
